scenario_description: The user wants to change a deadline in the project plan but doesn't say which one. The agent asks before making the change.

command:
printf 'Project Plan

Project Name: E-Commerce Platform Upgrade

I. Project Phases
Phase 1: Requirements Research
  Deadline: April 30, 2025

Phase 2: Development & Implementation
  Deadline: July 31, 2025

Phase 3: Testing & Acceptance
  Deadline: September 30, 2025

II. Resource Requirements
Developers: 5
Testers: 2
' > /home/user/Desktop/project_plan.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Change the first deadline to "June 30, 2025", then save
